text:
CTA Structure is one of the key pillars in your GEO audit. It evaluates how effectively your call-to-action (CTA) elements communicate their intent to AI agents. This includes aspects like button labels, link clarity, and the overall intent of forms. 

A well-structured CTA helps AI tools that crawl your site understand what actions are available, which can improve your visibility to AI agents. Your current score of 42/100 indicates there's room for improvement in this area. Focusing on clearer, more compelling CTAs can enhance your site's performance in AI visibility. 

If you need specific recommendations on how to improve this score, let me know!
